zh.Chagford,Devon,England: 英國英格蘭戴文哈福德
zh.lifeSummary: 當John Prouse Lord of Bredy於1456年出生在英國戴文哈福德時，他的父親Richard Prowse49歲，母親Margaret Norton23歲。他於1472年與Joan Orchard在英國英格蘭戴文哈福德結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1526年9月24日在英國英格蘭戴文哈福德享年70歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John Prouse Lord of Bredy于1456年出生在英国戴文哈福德时，他的父亲Richard Prowse49岁，母亲Margaret Norton23岁。他于1472年与Joan Orchard在英国英格兰戴文哈福德结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于1526年9月24日在英国英格兰戴文哈福德享年70岁。

nameMeanings.name: Prouse
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Americanized form of German and Jewish (Ashkenazic)   Preuss  .
Americanized form of German Brause 2, a nickname for a violent, stormy person, from Middle High German brūs ‘noise, storm’.

variants.name: Prowse
meanings: English (Devon and Cornwall): nickname from Middle English prous, prus, variant forms of prou ‘brave, valiant, proud’ (see Prue ).
English (Devon and Cornwall): ethnic name: from Middle English Prus(se), Pruce ‘Prussia, Prussian’, for someone from that region. Compare Sprouse .
Americanized form of German   Prause   or   Praus  , or perhaps of some other similar (like-sounding) surname.

nameMeanings.name: John
meanings: Greek: the Lord gave graciously; whom Jehovah gave; whom Jehovah bestowed.

en.lifeSummary: When John Prouse Lord of Bredy was born in 1456, in Chagford, Devon, England, his father, Richard Prowse, was 49 and his mother, Margaret Norton, was 23. He married Joan Orchard in 1472, in Chagford, Devon, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 3 daughters. He died on 24 September 1526, in Chagford, Devon, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 70.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Prouse Lord of Bredy est né en 1456, à Chagford, Devon, Angleterre, son père, Richard Prowse, avait 49 ans et sa mère, Margaret Norton, avait 23 ans. Il a épousé Joan Orchard en 1472, à Chagford, Devon, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé le 24 septembre 1526, à Chagford, Devon, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 70 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als John Prouse Lord of Bredy 1456 in Chagford, Devon, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Richard Prowse 49 und seine Mutter Margaret Norton 23. Er hat 1472 in Chagford, Devon, England, United Kingdom Joan Orchard geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb am 24. September 1526 im Alter von 70 Jahren in Chagford, Devon, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John Prouse Lord of Bredy è nato il nel 1456 nel Chagford, Devon, England, il suo padre, Richard Prowse, aveva 49 anni e il suo madre, Margaret Norton, aveva 23 anni. Lui sposato Joan Orchard nel 1472, nel Chagford, Devon, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 3 figlie. Morì il 24 settembre 1526, nel Chagford, Devon, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 70 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: John Prouse Lord of Bredyが1456年にイギリスデボンチャグフォードで生まれた時，父Richard Prowseは49歳，母Margaret Nortonは23歳であった。1472年にイギリスイギリスデボンチャグフォードでJoan Orchardと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1526年9月24日にイギリスイギリスデボンチャグフォードで70歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: John Prouse Lord of Bredy(이)가 1456년 영국 데폰 차그퍼드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Richard Prowse(은)는 49세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret Norton(은)는 23세였다. 그는 1472년 영국 잉글랜드 데폰 차그퍼드에서 Joan Orchard(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1526년 9월 24일 영국 잉글랜드 데폰 차그퍼드에서 70세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John Prouse Lord of Bredy nasceu em 1456, em Chagford, Devon, Inglaterra, seu pai, Richard Prowse, tinha 49 anos e sua mãe, Margaret Norton, tinha 23 anos. Ele casou-se com Joan Orchard em 1472, em Chagford, Devon, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu em 24 de setembro de 1526, em Chagford, Devon, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 70 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Prouse Lord of Bredy родился в 1456 г. в местности чагфорд, девон, Англия, его отцу по имени Richard Prowse было 49 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret Norton, 23. Он женился на женщине по имени Joan Orchard в 1472 г. в местности чагфорд, девон, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 3 дочери. Он умер 24 сентября 1526 г. в местности чагфорд, девон, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 70 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando John Prouse Lord of Bredy nació en 1456, en Chagford, Devon, Inglaterra, su papá, Richard Prowse, tenía 49 años y su mamá, Margaret Norton, tenía 23 años. Se casó con Joan Orchard en 1472, en Chagford, Devon, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió el 24 de septiembre de 1526, en Chagford, Devon, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 70 años.
